step_rationale: Sphingolipid; promotes endothelial dysfunction and vascular inflammation.
mechanism: Ceramide C24:1/C24:0 is a pro-inflammatory sphingolipid that activates endothelial dysfunction and vascular inflammation, contributing to atherosclerotic plaque complexity and thrombotic risk.

references.title: Prognostic significance of metabolomic biomarkers in patients with diabetes mellitus and coronary artery disease.
